description: Two-phase anomaly detection on a monthly series: Phase 1 linear-detrends the context and flags |Z|>=2 (WARNING) / |Z|>=3 (CRITICAL); Phase 2 forecasts with TimesFM and classifies points outside the 60%/80% quantile prediction intervals.
rules: INPUT_CSV must have columns date and anomaly_c (one monthly observation per row)
Phase 1 is pure numpy/pandas; Phase 2 needs timesfm + torch + HuggingFace weights
thresholds are fixed module constants: WARNING_Z=2.0, CRITICAL_Z=3.0
without timesfm/torch the porter degrades to an empty {} report (exit 0) so the contract holds
usage: Set INPUT_CSV (date,anomaly_c). Output: anomaly_detection.json with context_detections, forecast_detections, and per-phase CRITICAL/WARNING summaries.
limitation: Full two-phase output requires timesfm[torch] and network for first-run weights; offline it produces an empty report. The core uses TimesFM 1.0 (freq=[0]) for the forecast phase.
